name: scsynthdef-compiler-node-parity
description: Node harness that mirrors examples/sclang_parity.rs using the jco-generated TypeScript bindings.

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && cargo component build --release --features component --target wasm32-wasip1 && jco transpile ../../target/wasm32-wasip1/release/scsynthdef_compiler.wasm -o examples/node/pkg
